name: Eval滥用率 Eval Abuse Rate
desc: All 3 eval calls were preceded by fresh edits — every consecutive pair has an intervening create_file.

steps.t: Step 298: eval — obs 'Eval finish! You have remaining 2 eval times.'
Step 305: create_file /workspace/task/basic_inference.py (further edit before next eval)
Step 319: eval — pair (298→319) has edits at 299,305 → not abuse
Step 326: eval — pair (319→326) has edit at 320 → not abuse
abuse_count = 0 over 2 consecutive eval pairs → M11 = 0/2 = 0.00
